title: Staff: Ryan Mobley
display_label: Ryan Mobley, CRA, CFRA, CPRA — Training and Communications Coordinator
staff_title: Training and Communications Coordinator, Office of Research Administration
previous_roles: Senior Program Administrator, ASCEND and RCMI NIH cooperative agreements (Morgan State, 2015-2022)
content:
Mr. Ryan Mobley, CRA, CFRA, CPRA is the Training and Communications Coordinator, Office of Research Administration.

Office: Tyler Hall, Suite 304. Phone: 443-885-4771. Email: ryan.mobley@morgan.edu.

Mr. Ryan Mobley serves as the Training and Communications Coordinator for the Office of Research Administration. He designs and delivers research administration training programs tailored to faculty and staff, focused on Morgan's internal grant management processes while aligning with applicable state and federal regulations.

In collaboration with ORA colleagues, Mr. Mobley leads communication initiatives including email bulletins and newsletters that share updates on evolving policies and procedures.

Prior to joining ORA, he was a Senior Program Administrator for two major NIH-funded cooperative agreements (ASCEND and RCMI) from 2015 to 2022. In that role he managed budget oversight, staff onboarding, training delivery on the Banner finance system, and processing internal administrative requests.

Driven by a deep passion for education, he is committed to equipping faculty and staff with the knowledge and confidence to successfully manage their sponsored research awards.

Education: BS in Accounting, Towson University.

Certifications: Certified Research Administrator (CRA) (Research Administrators Certification Council; Certified Financial Research Administrator (CFRA) (Research Administrators Certification Council; Certified Pre-Award Research Administrator (CPRA) (Research Administrators Certification Council.
